channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Obsidian Lens - Thu Apr 09 15:30:18 UTC 2026
item.description:
Bring your Obsidian vault into JetBrains IDEs. View, navigate, and link your notes without leaving the editor. Features Wiki-link rendering — [[Note|Alias]] folds...
vendor: Oleksandr Kharchenko downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.jarviis.obsidian.obsidian-lens

item.title: Klib Lens - Wed Apr 08 07:31:45 UTC 2026
item.description:
Beautifies the output of decompiled Knm / Klib files by shortening cinterop annotations and removing redundant noisy compiler comments.
vendor: Benny Huo downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.bennyhuo.kotlin.kliblens

item.title: MCP Steroid - Wed Apr 08 11:35:37 UTC 2026

item.title: DFA Analysis - Thu Apr 09 13:29:10 UTC 2026
item.description:
Relational Dataflow Analysis engine. Contains RML DSL, RML-based analysis, Taint Analysis RML extension, IR serialization via protobuf and trace UI.
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.intellij.dfa.analysis
